title: gilia splendens subsp. grinnellii
intro: Gilia splendens subsp. grinnellii, also known as Grinnell's gilia, is a species of flowering plant in the phlox family, Polemoniaceae, native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Grinnell's gilia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
